items.title: Transfer rumors, news: Man United eye shock move for Liverpool's Mac Allister
items.description: Manchester United are considering a shock move for Liverpool midfielder Alexis Mac Allister. Transfer Talk has the latest.

items.title: Men's AP Top 25 poll reaction: Michigan is the new No. 1
items.description: After nine straight weeks at the top, the Wildcats fall after back-to-back losses, making way for the Wolverines.

items.title: Heise 3 lifts ISU hours after sister scores for U.S.
items.description: Hours after sister Taylor Heise scored to help the U.S. women's Olympic hockey team beat Sweden 5-0 in Milan, Nate Heise hit a go-ahead 3-pointer in N...

items.title: Hill, cut by Fins, vows 'the Cheetah will be back'
items.description: The Dolphins released Tyreek Hill in a flurry of roster moves that will clear significant salary cap space.

items.title: USA's Meyers Taylor, 41, wins 1st Olympic gold
items.description: The United States' Elana Meyers Taylor won the women's monobob title Monday to win her first Olympic gold medal at age 41.
